title: Small intestine
body_html:
Key Points
  • Blood supply via Superior Mesenteric Artery
  • Referred pain via spinal roots T9 and T10
  • Meckel's diverticulum as potential site for perforation of ileum
  • Jejunum and ileum are suspended by mesentery and prone to injury in blunt trauma
1
1
Anatomy
Abdomen & pelvis
Key Points
